objective: BUY-only, liquid, high-conviction threshold trades. SELL-side blocked after paper trade evidence showed -50.6% ROI on 35 SELL trades.

rationale.v5_changes: Added tail_unblocks (empty at launch) and bankroll_slices. P2 tail-calibration infrastructure ships behind enable_tail_calibration flag; no behavior change until operator adds pairs to tail_unblocks after two consecutive weekly scorecards agree qualifies_for_unblock.
rationale.v4_changes: Added allowed_position_sides: [yes] to block SELL-side trades. After 81 settled paper trades under v3, SELL-side had -50.6% ROI across 35 trades (8W/27L) while BUY-side had +9.4% ROI across 46 trades (9W/37L). The EMOS models appear miscalibrated on the negative tail - predicting rare events wont happen when they often do. BUY-only means cheap lottery-ticket bets at low entry prices with asymmetric payoff when the model is correct.
rationale.v3_changes: Added allowed_settlement_rules: [lte, gt] to block bucket markets. 8/9 bucket trades lost under v2.
rationale.v2_changes: Tightened from v1: min_abs_edge 0.08 -> 0.15, min_volume24hr 500 -> 2000, max_candidates 5 -> 3, blocked Washington DC.
